---
title: "climakitae documentation revamp"
author: "Neil Schroeder"
date: "2026-05-14"
description: "The Analytics Engine team has launched a complete revamp of the climakitae documentation."
categories: [Announcement]
citation: false
---

The Analytics Engine team has launched a complete revamp of the climakitae documentation. The updated docs introduce the new `ClimateData` interface and its associated processors, replacing the legacy `DataParameters` and `get_data()` workflow.

New additions include:

- **Notebook Gallery** showcasing cae-notebooks
- **How-To guides** covering common tasks like clipping, exporting, and bias correction
- **Migration Guide** to help users transition from the old interface to `ClimateData`

Explore the new documentation [here](https://cal-adapt.github.io/climakitae/dev/).
